corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

aggregation.method: first terminal receipt for each exact final case input across the release batch and two corrected-input compaction attempts
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

candidate.source_identity_note: aggregate pre-receipt revision; every selected case binds the exact final release package and evaluation input
candidate.selection_note: Thirteen receipts are the first terminal results for their exact repaired-package inputs. Compaction recovery is the first terminal pass for the final bounded prompt and semantic oracle; its timeout and pre-correction failure are retained as invalidated, and no unchanged input was rerun.

public_0_2.selection_note: receipt-mismatch remains exact because its bound inputs are unchanged; review-inventory-gate is the first public-0.2 result for the corrected semantic oracle.
